sentence: 考试舞弊被发现后，他被取消了成绩。
pinyin: Kǎo shì wǔ bì bèi fā xiàn hòu, tā bèi qǔ xiāo le chéng jì.
english: After his exam fraud was discovered, his scores were disqualified.

sentence: 他官至兵部侍郎，深得皇帝信任。
pinyin: Tā guān zhì bīng bù shì láng, shēn dé huáng dì xìn rèn.
english: He rose to the position of vice-minister of the Board of War, deeply trusted by the emperor.

meaning: 1. to tease; 2. to poke fun at
sentence: 同事们开会前互相调笑，气氛很轻松。
pinyin: Tóng shì men kāi huì qián hù xiāng tiáo xiào, qì fēn hěn qīng sōng.
english: Colleagues teased each other before the meeting, and the atmosphere was relaxed.

sentence: 在物理课上，老师解释了参考系的概念。
pinyin: Zài wù lǐ kè shàng, lǎo shī jiě shì le cān kǎo xì de gài niàn.
english: In physics class, the teacher explained the concept of a frame of reference.

sentence: 考古队在城郊发现了一座汉代古墓。
pinyin: Kǎo gǔ duì zài chéng jiāo fā xiàn le yī zuò Hàn dài gǔ mù.
english: An archaeology team discovered a Han dynasty tomb on the outskirts of the city.
